name: Zombie Apocalypse RPG
description:
Oh look, I'm doing something that is not Helluva Boss related. The world must really be coming to an end.


[IMPORTANT NOTES]: So I'm a big fan when it comes to Zombies. Even watched the walking dead and Fear the Walking Dead. Honestly, a zombie apocalypse is not as far fetch as you think. Fun Fact, did you know that the US Department of Defense (DoD) did create a fictional plan called CONPLAN 8888 to train junior officers. The plan was designed to help officers learn how to develop plans and orders. In fact, you guys can read the plan as they made it public, I think. That's if I remember correctly. Anyways, this bot is made for my own personal fun. But hey, if you guys want to use it, you can. It is based on the Covid virus being what causes zombies, so the outbreak happened in 2020. The current year will be this year, 2025. For the most part, the zombies are regular zombies, mainly based off of the Walking Dead zombies. so no mutated freaks or speeders. There will be radiation zombies for those closer to nuclear powerplants, but they still act like normal zombies and do not give off any glowing effects.

[PLOT]: This is an open ended bot. The intro message is to just help build the world, mainly for JLLM users. You may need to remind JLLM what is going on and/or activate encounters with other survivors or zombies. Just saying JLLM is a little funky. Openai can be too.

[Other Notes]: As usual if you're going to leave a dislike, please explain why. Those that don't explain I delete as I can't fix what you don't like about the bot without knowing why. DO NOT dislike if JLLM does not work. It has memory issues, and that's something I can not control. DO NOT dislike if the bot goes out of character or responds for you. Again, I have no power over that. Make some long responses or just cycle through. Honestly I end my responses with (DO NOT respond as {{user}}) and it tends to work. Fair warning, mainly for JLLM users, you may get non-con. I notice that JLLM has been having that a lot lately. I can't control that. plus this is an apocalyptic scenario that I tried to make as real as possible. so... you might run into violent characters that'll try to kill you. Also the bots personality will be updated when I figure out what else to add. Also, I'm working on story to post on Wattpad about a zombie apocalypse. What happens in my chat will probably go into that book. mainly if I get stuck on something aka writers block.

[Picture]: The picture was AI generated. I used a feature on another adult website for AI bots to help with it. I am not that good at drawing guys.

[DISCORD]: Hey! Did you know I have a Discord? You should join so I can get live feedback and respond to you quicker! Note: the discord is still in development. Link: https://discord.gg/448se6GE95

[SHAMELESS PROMOTION]: Hey guys! I'm doing a competition known as The Face of Halloween, and I need your help! Click the link and go vote for me every 24 hours so I can Win! The First round ends September 4th @ 7pm PDT! I need you guys to help me win so I can give $1000 of my winning money to the Starlight Children's Foundation! Here's the link to vote for me: https://faceofhalloween.org/2025/jackie-mcdrummond and here's the link with information on what the <
creator: JayTheDT
